title: Country of Witches
overview: Arusu passes her days at school wishing she had magical powers.

title: One-Hundred Sprites
overview: When  Arusu tries to learn how to ride a broomstick, she frees one hundred  imprisoned fairies, creating a crisis in the Magical Realm.

title: Magic Broom
overview: Arusu, Sheila, and Eva head off to capture the hundred fairies and lift the Curse of Eternal Youth.

title: Sprite-War
overview: Arusu encounters an Ecoo Fairy, who will grant her a single wish.

title: Demon Led Book
overview: Arusu seeks a way back to the Human Realm, but discovers her book of spells is not just any old book.

title: Griffin's Feather
overview: Arusu must acquire the feather of a griffin.  Can she figure out a way to do it without robbing the fairy of its freedom?

title: Pisky's Tusk
overview: With many of the fairies still missing, Sheila struggles to teach the Apprentice. Eva helps Arusu find another route to the Human Realm.

title: Forest of No Return
overview: Arusu and Eva get lost in the Forest of No Return, which tests their magical abilities to the limits.

title: Petrification Spell
overview: With the Witch Evaluations looming,  the Apprentice Witches stress over the biggest test of their lives.

title: Large Flood
overview: The Witch Evaluations are interrupted by a vengeful fairy.

title: Witch Tradition
overview: The arrival of an uninvited guest opens old wounds for Sheila.

title: Happy Birthday
overview: The group searches for Sheila after she runs away from home, but there are unintended consequences for Arusu.

title: Witch Sigma
overview: Arusu's pledge to only use magic to help people is put to the test during a deadly encounter.

title: Sheila's Doubts
overview: Arusu and Eva help the fairies ward off the warlocks. Sheila questions her future as a witch.

title: Cursed Magic
overview: Sigma works to gain the group's trust.

title: Eva's Courage
overview: Eva flies to the Dark Caves to find the flower that can save Sheila and Arusu's lives.

title: Infiltration! Demon World
overview: Arusu, Sheila, and Eva disguise themselves as men to enter the Wizard Kingdom.

title: True Wizard
overview: Arusu is rescued by a wizard named Will, a rebel warlock who has answers to questions Arusu has asked her entire life.

title: Desperate Situation
overview: Sigma reveals a dark, dangerous secret that could save the world.

title: Magic-Girl Squad
overview: Arusu tries to convince Sheila and Eva to form the Magic-Girl Squad, a group devoted to protecting the fairies from the Warlocks.

title: Interdimensional Sea
overview: Arusu travels along the Interdimensional Sea to the Human Realm.

title: Pirate Lennon
overview: The exiled witches face a stiff challenge: using magic once again.

title: Witch of Betrayal
overview: Sheila begins her search for the witch who uses black magic.

title: Light of Hope
overview: Sheila and Arusu's relationship thaws as Sheila returns to the Magical Realm.

title: Doubt
overview: The Magic-Girl Squad works to unravel the mysteries of Lennon's past.

title: Broken Heart
overview: In the Warlock Prison, Sigma discovers his cellmate might have the answers to some very important questions.

title: Omen of Destruction
overview: The Warlocks step up their search for the remaining fairies and for the True Book of Spells.

title: Full Attack
overview: As the Warlocks near Witch Heaven, Atelia rallies her fellow witches to fight for their freedom.

title: True Demon-Led Book
overview: The responsibilities of protecting the True Book of Spells take their toll on Arusu.

title: Lennon's True Character
overview: When Lennon confronts Atelia, the shocking secrets of his past affect everyone in the Magical Realm.

title: Painful Thoughts
overview: When Atelia weakens, a power struggle emerges amongst the witches of the Magical Realm.

title: One Should Protect the Truth
overview: Armed with valuable information, Sigma attempts to bargain his freedom.

title: Papa is Alive
overview: Atelia takes a stand, and Arusu formulates a plan to rescue her father--but at what cost?

title: Promise
overview: As Arusu and Lennon travel to Wizard Kingdom to exchange the True Book of Spells,Sheila and Eva race to stop her.

title: Collapse
overview: Arusu comes face-to-face with the ominous leader of the Warlocks.

title: Escape
overview: Arusu learns she has the power to save the Magical Realm, but with the world crumbling around her, will she have time to save it?

title: Demise
overview: In the wake of the destruction of Wizard Kingdom, Arusu struggles to harness the Magic of Light.

title: Black Magic
overview: Sheila proposes an unconventional plan to save Witch Heaven.

title: Magic of Light
overview: The power of Dark Magic is unleashed--from an incredibly unlikely source.

title: Hope
overview: In order to save the Magical Realm, Arusu journeys to where it all began: the Human Realm.
